texto: I grew up with six brothers, and I'm from Chicago, so princesses and Barbie dolls were not around the house. It was more like sports and comic books, so getting to work for Marvel is like my version of being able to be a princess.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Chloe Bennet: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a trabalho. O trecho “I grew up with six brothers, and I'm from Chicago, so princesses and Barbie dolls were not around…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que trabalho, work, princess pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de trabalho e princess.
